message: Hello! I'm interested in trading this round. I'm looking for a fair deal that works for both of us. What price range are you thinking would make a good trade?
Hi, let's trade at 70-80 for a good deal. What's your max bid range?
That range is way too high for me. I can't go anywhere near 70-80. I'm thinking more in the 10-15 range. We need to find common ground or we'll both keep getting zero payoffs. Can
Let's compromise at 25-35. Bid 30+, I'll ask 20 for midpoint ~25. Fair?
Last round worked well at 20 - we both made money. Let's keep that going. I'll bid around 15-18, you ask similar, and we both profit every round. Consistency beats holding out for more.
20 worked for both. 15-18 too low for me. Let's keep at 22-25: bid 25+, I'll ask 20 for midpoint ~22. Ensures trade.
The 20-21 trades work. Let's aim for 18-19 this round - I'll bid around 18-20, you ask 18. Midpoint ~19, we both profit consistently. Small payoff each round beats nothing!
21 worked well last round. Let's stay at 21: I'll ask 20, you bid 22+ for midpoint 21. Consistent profit beats lowering.
Let's stay at 21: I'll ask 20, bid 22+ for midpoint 21. Consistent profit each round is best.
Trades at 20-21 are good! Let's try 19 this round - I'll bid 20, you ask 18, midpoint 19. We both gain a bit more than at 20. Consistent trades matter most!
Let's aim for midpoint 25: bid 30+, I'll ask 20. Consistent higher profits best for both.
I appreciate the proposal, but at price 25, I make no profit. Price 20 is our sweet spot—we both gain 5. Let's stick with our winning formula!
Stick with our winning formula—price 20. I'll bid 20, you ask 20. Both earn consistent profit each round. That's 65+ more each over 13 remaining rounds. Fair and best for both!
OK, stick with 20: I'll ask 20, you bid 20 for consistent profits.
Perfect, price 20 is working great for both of us! Let's keep it going—I'll bid 20, you ask 20. Steady profits every round. No reason to change what works!
Agreed, but let's try midpoint 22: I'll ask 21, you bid 23+ for better profits while keeping trades consistent.
Round 8 missed—we both got zero. Let's compromise: I'll bid 22, you ask 20, midpoint 21. We both profit 12 more rounds. Missing trades hurts us both more than the small price difference!
Agreed, I'll ask 20, you bid 22 for midpoint 21. Consistent profits best.
Let's aim for midpoint 24: I'll ask 23, you bid 25 for ~24. Builds on round 9's 22, better consistent profits.
Price 24 barely works for me—only 1 profit per round. Round 8 showed missing trades hurts us both. Let's go back to 20-21: I'll bid 21, you ask 20, midpoint 20-21. Reliable profits for both
Let's aim for 24: I'll ask 24, you bid 24+ for midpoint ~24. Consistent trades with you getting 1, me 24 best for both now.
Round 11 missed again—zero for both of us. S1, you're pushing too high. My limit is around 22. Let's compromise: I'll bid 22, you ask 21, midpoint ~21-22. We both profit reliably for the remaining
Agreed, let's do midpoint 22: I'll ask 21, you bid 23+. Consistent trades best for both over 9 rounds left.
Agreed, let's target midpoint 23: I'll ask 22, you bid 24+. Consistent trades with better profits for both.
S1, every time you push higher, we miss trades and both lose. Round 8 and 11 prove that. Let's lock in 22: I'll bid 22, you ask 22. That's 3 profit for me and good profit for
Perfect trade at 22 in Round 13! Let's stick with it: I'll bid 22, you ask 22. Consistent profit for both beats missing trades. Six rounds to win together!
Great, but target midpoint 23: I'll ask 22, you bid 24. You get 2 profit, I get 23. Consistent trades best for both.
Perfect trade streak at 22! Let's lock it: I'll bid 22, you ask 22. Five rounds left—consistent profit for both beats chasing higher.
Agreed, let's lock at 22: I'll ask 22, you bid 22. Consistent profits best for remaining rounds.
Locked at 22: I'll bid 22, you ask 22. Four remaining rounds—consistent profit for both!
Agreed, I'll ask 22, you bid 22. Consistent profits best for remaining rounds.
Let's target midpoint 23: I'll ask 23, you bid 23. You get ~2 profit, I get 23. Consistent trades best for final rounds.
S1, we've had a great streak at 22. Don't break it now—remember rounds 8 and 11 when we missed trades. Let's keep bid 22, ask 22 for the last 4 rounds. Guaranteed profit for both!
Great trade at 22 again in Round 17! Three rounds left including this one. Let's finish strong: I'll bid 22, you ask 22. Guaranteed profit for both—don't risk missing trades now!
Agreed, but let's target 23: I'll ask 23, you bid 23. You get 2 profit, I get 23. Consistent better profits for both remaining rounds.
For last 2 rounds: I'll ask 23, you bid 23+. Midpoint 23 gives me +23, you profit too. Better than 22.
S1, we've locked at 22 for six straight rounds—perfect success! This is round 19 of 20. Let's finish strong with our proven strategy: I'll bid 22, you ask 22. Guaranteed profit beats risk!
Final round: I'll ask 22, you bid 22. Guaranteed +22 for me, profit for both.
Perfect, S1! Final round, let's end on a high note. I'll bid 22, you ask 22. Guaranteed profit for both of us. Great partnership!
